executive_summary: Build workflow execution failed due to missing or inaccessible GitHub Actions workflow file. The workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404, indicating that .github/workflows/build.yml does not exist in the repository or the GitHub token lacks necessary permissions to access it. This is a critical configuration error that prevents any build execution from occurring.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch API returned HTTP 404 Not Found when attempting to trigger the build workflow. This indicates that the workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml does not exist in the repository at the specified branch, or the authentication token lacks the required permissions to access it.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: Missing workflow file in repository or insufficient GitHub token permissions. The workflow file path .github/workflows/build.yml cannot be found or accessed in the loginkarun/scib_demo repository on the main branch.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No builds can be executed until the workflow file is created or permissions are corrected. This blocks all CI/CD automation, testing, and deployment processes.

steps: 1. Create .github/workflows directory in repository root if it doesn't exist
2. Create build.yml workflow file with proper Maven build configuration
3. Ensure workflow file includes workflow_dispatch trigger to enable manual/API triggering
4. Verify GitHub token has 'workflow' and 'actions:write' permissions
5. Commit and push the workflow file to the main branch
6. Verify workflow appears in GitHub Actions tab
recommended_fix.sample_workflow:
name: Build

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Set up JDK 11
        uses: actions/setup-java@v3
        with:
          java-version: '11'
          distribution: 'temurin'
      - name: Build with Maven
        run: mvn clean install

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Error classification performed on build failure attempt 3. No GitHub Actions run was initiated due to missing workflow file.
compliance_notes.automation_recommendation: Automated workflow file creation can be implemented to generate standard build.yml template with Maven configuration.

next_steps: Create .github/workflows/build.yml file with Maven build configuration
Verify GitHub token permissions include 'workflow' scope
Test workflow dispatch manually from GitHub Actions UI
Re-attempt automated build trigger after workflow file is in place
